question: When Dad lived with his parents, what did he used to do at the meal?
choices: Attempt to merge the soup bubbles into one big bubble using a fork
Practice variations of his "one fake dumpling" joke in Mandarin
Hone an ambidextrous use of the chopsticks
Try to use as much English as possible

question: Ye Ye's favorite story to tell about Dad's childhood is that Dad...
choices: Played his hand in the linoleum and held up the other hand to indicate how he would eat
Was injured by another kid who swung around a nail / wood plank and recieved a bag of apology oranges
Subtly got water on those below the balcony in Taiwan when it was already raining
Used a washboard as a makeshift bridge across a "large" septic pit

question: When Facebook first IPO'd, Dad...
choices: Sold it for cash and gave large amounts to Christian charities
Acquired a family yacht and named it "Active II" (is Active I still sailing?)
Invested it in a single stablecoin suggested by his friends
Did nothing. He still owns these shares and thus "diamond-handed" himself to richness.
